overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting characters walking through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis at night. The camera follows pedestrians through urban canyons, across illuminated intersections, and past towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and vibrant street lighting.

events.description: characters step onto yellow crosswalk with glowing green WALK text and begin crossing the street

agents.ego_description: following two pedestrians across an illuminated intersection while observing neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top walking ahead of camera toward crosswalk

entered.detail: illuminated convenience store sign with blue and white lettering
towering skyscraper with intricate geometric architecture rising above surrounding buildings
traditional red paper lanterns hanging from building awning
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with green illuminated WALK symbols

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city street at night, following two characters past a 24/7 convenience store. The camera approaches and crosses a brightly lit yellow crosswalk with glowing green walk signals, while a massive futuristic spire towers in the background against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with neon-lit building facade

events.description: turns left off main street into narrower sidewalk corridor beside building with magenta neon lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians near a building with vibrant pink neon accents

entered.detail: multi-story building facade illuminated with bright pink and cyan neon strip lighting
metal security shutter covering ground-level storefront

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower urban corridor where the camera turns left alongside a building bathed in magenta neon light. The sidewalk becomes more enclosed as the camera moves past closed storefront shutters, with the futuristic city spire now visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching open plaza with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: proceeding steadily along the sidewalk toward an open plaza area with large digital displays visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic white vehicle driving along the street ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on building facade
striped red and white awning over closed shop front

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with closed storefronts, the camera approaches a more open plaza area. A large digital advertisement billboard becomes prominent on the right, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with digital screens

events.description: enters wide open intersection from narrow street, revealing expansive plaza with multiple digital billboards
crosses busy intersection alongside crowd of pedestrians moving in multiple directions

agents.ego_description: navigating across a wide intersection filled with pedestrians, moving with the flow of the crowd toward the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: massive vertical digital display showing advertisements on blue building facade
multi-story building with distinctive blue and red color scheme

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide, bustling intersection bathed in neon light from massive digital screens. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a moderate crowd of pedestrians, with a distinctive blue building facade becoming prominent on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk beside blue industrial building

events.description: exits open intersection into narrow corridor between buildings with blue concrete wall dominating right side

agents.ego_description: proceeding along a narrow sidewalk next to a blue industrial wall, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: smooth blue concrete wall with metal grate windows running along the sidewalk
security grate covering windows on the blue building

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow, more enclosed urban corridor with a distinctive blue building wall running along the right side. The lighting becomes dimmer and more sheltered as the camera progresses along the concrete sidewalk, passing pedestrians and metal-grated windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched metropolis, transitioning from wide, illuminated intersections into narrow, sheltered urban corridors. It begins on a city street following two characters past a 24/7 convenience store and across a glowing yellow crosswalk, with a massive futuristic spire looming in the background. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts into a tighter corridor bathed in magenta neon light and lined with closed storefront shutters. The scene then opens into a bustling plaza and wide intersection filled with digital billboards and passing futuristic vehicles before crossing another yellow-striped walkway toward a prominent blue building facade. Finally, the camera moves into a dimmer, more enclosed alleyway, progressing along a concrete sidewalk past metal-grated windows and pedestrians.
